configuration_landmarks.entry_sequence: Press and hold FAN and SYSTEM MODE simultaneously
configuration_landmarks.save_sequence: Press SETTINGS button to commit and exit

Notes: Thermostat and HVAC unit must be powered Before starting
Configuration screens have been a 30-second timeout - if no action is taken thermostat exits configuration.

occ_trailing_digit.0: Occupancy Disabled / Door Switch Disabled / Temp Sensor Disabled
occ_trailing_digit.1: Occupany Enabled / Door Switch Normally CLosed / Temp Sensor Master
occ_trailing_digit.2: Door Switch Normally Open / Temp Sensor Average

pairing_a_sensor.description: Pair a New occupancy sensor, door switch, or temperature sensor to the thermostat
steps: Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons to access Mesh ID screen.
Press and Hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons again untill 'ZbEE' apperars.
Press SETTINGS button untill 'SENS' appears.
Press the butoon on the sensor to activate pairing.
Press FAN button on the thermostat to initiate pariing of a  new sensor. This starts a 10-second countdown and displays the last 5 digits of discovered sensor ID
Use UP/DOWN buttons to toggle between discovered sensors.
Ensure the unique device ID on screen matches the unique device ID on the sensor.
Press SETTINGS button when the Unique ID (numerical) apperars.
Select 'OCC1' for occupancy sensor, 'DS1' for door switch, 'rt1' for master temp sensor, 'rt2' for average temp sensor, or '0' to disable.
Press SETTINGS button - a 30-seconds countdown will begin. 'SUcc' will show when successfully paired.
If pairing fails press SYSTEM MODE button to try again.

configuring_sensor_fuctionality.description: Set or change role a paired sensor plays after it is already linked
steps: Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN until Mesh ID screen appears.
Press and Hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons again untill 'ZbEE' apperars.
Press SETTINGS button untill 'SENS' appears.
Press SETTINGS button to display th enumber of linked sensors.
Press SETTINGS button again to display the UniqueID of paired sensors. Use UP/DOWN to cycle through them.
Press SETTINGS button again. 'OCC1' will appear -use UP/DOWN to change digits based on the OCC trailing digit table.
Press SETTINGS buttion to configure Door Switch functionality (dsx). Set Normally Open (NO) or Normally CLosed (NC) depending on reed switch type.
Press SETTINGS button to conffigure Temperature Sensor fuctionality (rtx).
Press SETTINGS button to finalize paring.

binding_steps: Unpack the VX4 faceplate and populate the rear battery chamber with 2 AA cells.
Verify the display initializes into the master 'SETUP' wizard mode interface.
Input the targeted project-specific 'Mesh ID' network identifier string.
Input the unique 4-digit 'Room Number' identifier using the interface toggle keys.
Input the required 'Equipment Code' matched and extracted from the mechanical design sheet.
Press the SETTINGS key once to trigger the 30-second localized RF proximity discovery window.
Confirm on-screen feedback matches the barcode label ID printed on the physical HVAC controller shell.
Press the SETTINGS key a second time to lock down the RF channel binding parameters.
